nodes.name: 巴基斯坦
nodes.summary: 巴基斯坦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联106种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、雪鹑、彩雉等106种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-throated bushtit
nodes.summary: White-throated bushtit（Aegithalos niveogularis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-throated bushtit。

nodes.name: White-throated bushtit
nodes.summary: The white-throated bushtit (Aegithalos niveogularis), also known as the white-throated tit, is a species of bird in the family Aegithalidae. It is found in India, Nepal, and Pakistan. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-throated bushtit (Aegithalos niveogularis), also known as the white-throated tit, is a species of bird in the family Aegithalidae…
